title: image prune skips images with child images.
body:
While the image build process, intermediate images are created. These images are also used as cache images, used in rebuilding the same images. This fix the deletion of cache images.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/5444

 Signed-off-by: Kunal Kushwaha <kunal.kushwaha@gmail.com>

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5436) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5649) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@mtrmac PTAL. All issues are resolved now.

> were fixed previously but now are in the code again.
> 
> What is going on here? AFAICT it is not a caching issue on my end.

I am not sure, how that happens. I have updated all of the required changes. PTAL.
